Sewer Cleanout Installation | Chicago, IL

If your bungalow or flat needs Sewer Cleanout Installation in Chicago, IL, contact Plumbers 911 to resolve your issues quickly.

You're proud of your home, and you know that staying on top of maintenance, such as drain and sewer cleaning, can help keep everything working properly for an extended period of time. That's where a sewer cleanout comes in. A sewer cleanout is a capped one- or two-way pipe normally located outside the house attached to the main sewer line. 

It's used to unclog blocked drainage lines and help prevent sewage backup. If you're looking for sewer cleanout installation in Chicago, Plumbers 911 can help. Whether you live and work in the Loop, Oakland Park or Woodlawn, we can help you find a professional plumber for your sewer cleaning and sewer cleanout installation needs. 

Plumbers 911's network of experts provide emergency services, maintenance, repairs and installations. We work with trained plumbers who are fully licensed, bonded and insured and follow proper safety practices. Whatever your plumbing needs, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) and we'll put you in touch with a reliable local plumber.

Why You Might Need Sewer Cleanout Installation

A Sewer cleanout is an essential part of any home's plumbing system. It provides easy access to unclog your sewer if it gets blocked by hair, paper towels, sanitary products that are not meant to be flushed or waste. No matter how much care you take over what gets flushed and poured down the drain, it's likely that over years, waste products have built up in your pipes. 

Older sewer systems, in particular, need careful maintenance to reduce the risk of backed-up drains and damage to the pipework. Regular sewer cleaning is essential, and sewer cleanouts make the job less of a hassle.

Sewer Cleanout Installation Services in Chicago

When it comes to sewer cleanout installation in Chicago, Plumbers 911 has a large network of licensed plumbers who have the tools, knowledge and experience required to take care of your sewer system. Installing a sewer cleanout means cutting into the old sewer pipe and adding a capped section to it for easy access. 

This is a skilled job, and since it involves working with a pipe that transports wastewater, it must be done correctly due to the potential health hazards associated with sewage. It's important to work with professionals for this type of project because attempting DIY drain cleaning using fluids and foams from hardware stores can cause lasting damage to pipes. 

Our plumbers use safe, effective and long-lasting treatments for common drain problems, which helps you avoid expensive and disruptive troubleshooting in the future. Plumbers 911 is here to help you get connected with a licensed plumber who is experienced with sewer cleanout installations. Whatever your needs, we can help you access the best service in your area.

Sewer Cleanout Installation Cost in Chicago

Typical cost: $500-$2,000 for cleanout installation depending on location and access. We provide free estimates with transparent upfront pricing. Call 833-758-6911 for a quote.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is a sewer cleanout and do I need one?

A sewer cleanout is an access point that allows plumbers to clear blockages and perform camera inspections. Chicago code requires accessible cleanouts. If your home doesn't have one, or it's buried/inaccessible, installing one saves significant time and money on future sewer service.

Where should a sewer cleanout be located?

Ideally near the foundation wall where the sewer line exits your home, and/or near the property line. Chicago code has specific requirements. We install cleanouts in code-compliant locations.
